run.name: Deploy

head_commit.message:
Update `axerrno` and `page_table*`, add comments, bump to 0.3.0 due to incompatible deps  (#34)

* update axerrno to 0.2

* some small format fixes

* update page_table_entry and page_table_multiarch dependencies to version 0.6 in Cargo.toml

* chore: bump version to 0.3.0 in Cargo.toml

* test: add multi-frame allocation support and fix warning

* feat: update page_table_multiarch to 0.6

* fix: page table operations, to adapt `page_table*` 0.6

---------

Co-authored-by: YanLien <YJQ980314@outlook.com>
